title: Cobblepastas [Cobblemon]
description: Adds creepy new Cobblemon of legend to your world. Beware...
body:
The GEB version of Cobblepastas is currently on hiatus
-----

The Datapack
-----
Happy Halloween! This datapack adds multiple Pokemon from creepypastas to Cobblemon. A list of them and how to obtain them can be found in the README text file in the pack. Some evolution methods may change in the future once cobblemon fully supports them.

Credits
-----

Thanks to extra_a for allowing me to use their Meloetta model for S♪REN and Maashous for creating it! You can check out the datapack their Meloetta model comes from here: https://modrinth.com/datapack/legendary-encounters(cobblemon)

Thanks to 7thBoyofDynamite/daydreamfaze for allowing me to use their Unown King and Ghost model!

The Creepypastas
-----
Thanks to all the writers of these stories! Here's each creepypasta for each Pokemon in the datapack:

Ghost | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Pokémon_Black

Glitchlett | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Glitchlett

Nightmare | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Nightmare%27s_Revenge

S♪REN | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Sing_Meloetta

DISABLED | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Disabled

Charon | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Call_of_Charon

Pinkachu | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Cheap_Figures

Ryu | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Crushed

EEeEE | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Prevention_of_Evolution

Freakachu | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Easter_Egg_-_Snow_on_Mt._Silver

Unown King | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Curse_of_the_Unown_King

Eerie Ditto | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/White_Ditto

Eerie Umbreon | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/The_Umbreon

Eerie Paras/Amanita | https://pokepasta.miraheze.org/wiki/A_Reason_to_Live

Bad Egg/Manafetus | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Bad_Egg_Manaphy

Turmur | https://pokemon-snakewood.fandom.com/wiki/Turmur

Galactimon | https://pokemon-snakewood.fandom.com/wiki/Galactimon

Faceleech | https://pokemon-snakewood.fandom.com/wiki/Faceleech

Eerie Golduck | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Ashamed

731 | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Lavender_Town_and_Pokemon_731

Mishanter | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/My_dream_My_nightmare

Cofawer | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Hold_My_Breath

Learow | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Learow_and_The_Breakthrough

Poli | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Poliwhirl

FUtiLE | https://pokepasta.fandom.com/wiki/Stigmatised_scarlet

Eerie Scyther | https://creepypasta.fandom.com/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_Dark_Green
